leagueBriefing: A historic night in the NBA saw Shai Gilgeous-Alexander eclipse a legendary Wilt Chamberlain record, while Luka Doncic delivered a signature 51-point masterpiece in Los Angeles. The Eastern Conference-leading Pistons continued their dominance, and the Nuggets pulled off a stunning 20-point comeback to spoil a triple-double effort in San Antonio.

games.headline: Pistons dominate 76ers to maintain grip on Eastern Conference lead
games.brief: The Detroit Pistons looked every bit like the best team in the East, routing the 76ers from start to finish. Despite Philadelphia's attempts to trap Cade Cunningham and disrupt his rhythm, Detroit's depth took over, leading by as many as 17 in the first half and never looking back. It was a statement win for a Pistons squad that has quickly put a recent skid in the rearview mirror.
bullets: Duncan Robinson led a balanced Detroit attack with 19 points.
Cade Cunningham orchestrated the offense with 13 assists despite taking only six shots.
Jalen Duren dominated the glass, posting a double-double with 14 points and 10 rebounds.
Philadelphia has now lost five of its last seven games as they struggle to find consistency.
games.context: The victory helps Detroit solidify its position at the top of the Eastern Conference standings.

highlights.title: 76ERS at PISTONS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Booker’s 43-point outburst keeps Suns hot while Pacers’ slide continues
games.brief: Devin Booker was in total control in Indianapolis, pouring in 43 points to lead the Suns to their fourth straight win. The Pacers, playing their first game with trade-deadline acquisition Ivica Zubac, simply had no answer for the Phoenix backcourt. While Indiana kept it close early, the Suns' offensive firepower proved too much for a Pacers team that has now dropped 11 games in a row.
bullets: Devin Booker finished with 43 points, shot 14-of-31 from the floor, and was perfect from the line.
Jalen Green provided a massive spark with 36 points on efficient 14-of-23 shooting.
Andrew Nembhard led the struggling Pacers with 23 points, all of which came in the first half.
The Suns moved to a season-high 12 games over .500 with the victory.
games.context: Phoenix continues its climb up the Western Conference ladder while Indiana remains at the bottom of the league standings.

highlights.title: SUNS at PACERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Magic survive overtime thriller as Wizards' comeback falls short
games.brief: In a back-and-forth battle that needed extra time, the Orlando Magic managed to hold off a resilient Washington squad. The Wizards erupted for 42 points in the fourth quarter to force overtime, but Tristan da Silva and the Magic regained their composure in the extra period. It was a high-octane affair that saw Orlando's interior presence ultimately outweigh Washington's late-game shooting surge.
bullets: Tristan da Silva led the Magic with 26 points and delivered a crucial block in overtime.
Wizards' Bilal Coulibaly scored a career-high 29 points in the losing effort.
Paolo Banchero and Wendell Carter Jr. both recorded double-doubles for Orlando.
The loss marks the 10th consecutive defeat for Washington.
games.context: Orlando bolsters its playoff positioning in the East, while Washington continues to search for its first win in weeks.

highlights.title: WIZARDS at MAGIC | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Hawks soar to eighth straight win behind Jalen Johnson's near triple-double
games.brief: The Atlanta Hawks extended the league's longest active winning streak, dismantling the Nets in the final frame. Atlanta trailed briefly in the fourth quarter but responded with a decisive 10-0 run to put the game away. Jalen Johnson was everywhere for the Hawks, nearly recording a triple-double and anchoring a defense that held Brooklyn to just 18 points in the fourth quarter.
bullets: Jalen Johnson flirted with history, finishing with 21 points, 9 rebounds, and 9 assists.
Zaccharie Risacher added 19 points as Atlanta won its eighth consecutive game.
Brooklyn played without leading scorer Michael Porter Jr. due to an ankle injury.
Josh Minott led the Nets with a career-high 24 points.
games.context: The win moves Atlanta within 1.5 games of Toronto for the seventh seed in the Eastern Conference.

highlights.title: NETS at HAWKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Heat withstand Giannis’ 31 points to edge Bucks in Kaseya Center
games.brief: The Miami Heat used a disciplined team performance to overcome a 31-point night from Giannis Antetokounmpo. Milwaukee had a chance to tie the game in the final minute, but a missed three-pointer from Giannis allowed Miami to seal the victory with a clutch bucket on the ensuing possession. The Heat’s ability to control the glass and limit turnovers proved to be the difference in a tightly contested Eastern Conference battle.
bullets: Giannis Antetokounmpo led all scorers with 31 points but missed a potential game-tying three late.
Kel'el Ware anchored the Heat interior with 13 rebounds and 6 points.
Kasparas Jakučionis provided a key offensive spark for Miami with 18 points.
Ryan Rollins had a standout performance for Milwaukee with 16 points and 10 assists.
games.context: Miami improves to 38-29, keeping pace in the competitive middle of the Eastern Conference playoff race.

highlights.title: BUCKS at HEAT | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Middleton’s fourth-quarter takeover ends Mavericks’ losing streak
games.brief: Khris Middleton reminded everyone of his scoring pedigree, exploding for 22 points in the fourth quarter to single-handedly halt Dallas’ eight-game skid. The Mavericks dominated the paint and the boards against a severely depleted Memphis roster that had 11 players sidelined. Though the Grizzlies fought back to make it a two-point game heading into the fourth, they simply had no answer for Middleton’s late-game heroics.
bullets: Khris Middleton scored a season-high 35 points, including 8-of-10 from three-point range.
Daniel Gafford recorded a season-high 22 points and 14 rebounds.
The Mavericks outrebounded the Grizzlies 60-38, their highest total of the season.
Jaylen Wells led Memphis with 23 points in a game where the Grizzlies were missing 11 players.
games.context: The win provides much-needed relief for a Dallas team that had been reeling during a nine-game road stretch.

highlights.title: MAVERICKS at GRIZZLIES | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Nuggets erase 20-point deficit to stun Spurs in San Antonio
games.brief: In one of the most impressive comebacks of the season, the Denver Nuggets overcame a 20-point hole to beat the Spurs on the second night of a back-to-back. Nikola Jokic and Jamal Murray took turns dissecting the San Antonio defense in the second half, scoring a staggering 83 points after the break. The Spurs, playing without Victor Wembanyama, saw Stephon Castle post a historic triple-double, but it wasn't enough to stop the Denver juggernaut once it got rolling.
bullets: Jamal Murray scored 39 points, including the go-ahead three-pointer late in the fourth.
Nikola Jokic dominated with a line of 31 points, 20 rebounds, and 12 assists.
Spurs rookie Stephon Castle became the youngest player with a 30/10/10 triple-double.
Denver shot 50% from the field despite a sluggish 20% start in the first quarter.
games.context: The victory secures a crucial tiebreaker for Denver in the Western Conference standings.

highlights.title: NUGGETS at SPURS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Gilgeous-Alexander breaks Wilt Chamberlain's record in Thunder win
games.brief: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander etched his name into the history books, surpassing Wilt Chamberlain for the most consecutive games with 20+ points. Fittingly, his record-breaking night came in a heavyweight clash between the league's top two teams. In a game that came down to the final second, Chet Holmgren sank two clutch free throws with less than a second remaining to secure the Thunder's seventh straight win and spoil a valiant effort from the Jayson Tatum-less Celtics.
bullets: Gilgeous-Alexander scored 35 points, marking his 127th straight game with at least 20.
Chet Holmgren broke the tie with two free throws with 0.9 seconds left on the clock.
Jaylen Brown led the Celtics with 34 points in the absence of Jayson Tatum.
The Thunder have won every game since Gilgeous-Alexander returned from injury.
games.context: The victory cements Oklahoma City’s status as the team to beat with the NBA's best record.

highlights.title: CELTICS at THUNDER | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026

games.headline: Luka Doncic hits 51 points as Lakers cruise past Bulls in James’ return
games.brief: Luka Doncic put on a show for the ages in Los Angeles, exploding for 51 points to power the Lakers past Chicago. The night also marked the return of LeBron James, who shook off a slow start to provide a veteran spark in the third quarter. While the Bulls found success from beyond the arc to keep things interesting, they had no answer for Doncic’s relentless scoring as he recorded his first 50-point game in a Lakers uniform.
bullets: Luka Doncic finished with 51 points, 10 rebounds, and 9 assists.
LeBron James scored 18 points in his first game back after a three-game injury absence.
Austin Reaves contributed 30 points as the Lakers won their fourth straight.
Josh Giddey led the Bulls with 27 points, including six three-pointers.
games.context: The Lakers move into third place in the Western Conference standings with the victory.

highlights.title: BULLS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 12, 2026
